ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Aug-20-2019 Continued To Sep-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon Lazar for Michael Walsh.

Mr. Lazar stated that he has the bond in hand, that he is meeting with his Client today, that he will file the bond this afternoon and that a petition for final distribution will be filed by the end of next week. Status on filing of bond is continued to September 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-06-2019 Continued To Sep-03-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lon D. Lazar for Petitioner.

The Court stated that before it today were the issues of the Final Inventory & Appraisal and the Petition for Final Distribution. The Court addressed the partial Inventory & Appraisal and the amount of the bond. Mr. Lazar stated that the Final Inventory and Appraisal was ready to be filed today and that the waivers of accounting/petiton for final distribution were ready to be filed. The Court addressed Mr. Lazar stating that it is his responsibility to make sure that his client comes in ex parte to increase the bond. Mr. Lazar stated that by next Friday that the estate would be ready to close and that it is pretty cut and dry. The Court set status on the filing of the bond for August 20, 2019 at 9;00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court continued today's Status on Close of the Estate to September 3, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.
